ns0:entry.ns0:title: BuilderIO/agent-native
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BuilderIO/agent-native
Language: typescript
A framework for building agent-native applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
Language: typescript
Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/page-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/page-agent
Language: typescript
JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apify/crawlee
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apify/crawlee
Language: typescript
Crawlee—A web scraping and browser automation library for Node.js to build reliable crawlers. In JavaScript and TypeScript. Extract data for AI, LLMs, RAG, or GPTs. Download HTML, PDF, JPG, PNG, and other files from websites. Works with Puppeteer, Playwright, Cheerio, JSDOM, and raw HTTP. Both headful and headless mode. With proxy rotation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: continuedev/continue
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/continuedev/continue
Language: typescript
open-source coding agent

ns0:entry.ns0:title: devlikeapro/waha
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/devlikeapro/waha
Language: typescript
WAHA - WhatsApp HTTP API (REST API) that you can configure in a click! 3 engines: WEBJS (browser based), NOWEB (websocket nodejs), GOWS (websocket go)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
Language: typescript
Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 160+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: every-app/open-seo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/every-app/open-seo
Language: typescript
Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: garrytan/gstack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/garrytan/gstack
Language: typescript
Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-labs-code/design.md
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-labs-code/design.md
Language: typescript
A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grafana/grafana
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grafana/grafana
Language: typescript
The open and composable observability and data visualization platform. Visualize metrics, logs, and traces from multiple sources like Prometheus, Loki, Elasticsearch, InfluxDB, Postgres and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: heygen-com/hyperframes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: typescript
Write HTML. Render video. Built for agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jamiepine/voicebox
Language: typescript
The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koala73/worldmonitor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koala73/worldmonitor
Language: typescript
Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

ns0:entry.ns0:title: makeplane/plane
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/makeplane/plane
Language: typescript
🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mauriceboe/TREK

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stablyai/orca
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stablyai/orca
Language: typescript
Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: strapi/strapi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/strapi/strapi
Language: typescript
🚀 Strapi is the leading open-source headless CMS. It’s 100% JavaScript/TypeScript, fully customizable, and developer-first.
